en.extract:
The Guaiquinima whitestart (Myioborus cardonai), also known as the Guaiquinima redstart, saffron-breasted whitestart or saffron-breasted redstart, is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is endemic to humid highland forests on Cerro Guaiquinima in south-eastern Venezuela. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''Guaiquinima whitestart''' ('''''Myioborus cardonai'''''), also known as the '''Guaiquinima redstart''', '''saffron-breasted whitestart''' or '''saffron-breasted redstart''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Parulidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to humid highland forests on {{ill|Cerro Guaiquinima|es}} in south-eastern [[Venezuela]]. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
